title: COMMUNITY OUTREACH PROGRAMS AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - 211info
text: COMMUNITY CANCER CENTER COMMUNITY OUTREACH PROGRAMS AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides monthly support groups (one for survivors of all cancer types, and two specifically for breast cancer services), in addition to smoking cessation, and tobacco education courses. Volunteer opportunities are also available, including those for people with specialized skills and experience. All volunteers must pass a background check and complete intake procedures. 2880 NW Stewart Parkway Suite 100 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Community outreach and education classes: Varies by service Volunteer opportunities: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 672-0072 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 672-0072 Angelia Freeman [email protected] Toll-free (866) 836-4448 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Community outreach and education classes: Visit website for more information Volunteer opportunities: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Jackson, Josephine, and Lane Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From I-5 Northbound: Take Exit 127. Turn right on Edenbower Boulevard. Turn right on Stewart Parkway. CCC is on the right. From I-5 Southbound: Take Exit 127. Turn left on Edenbower Boulevard. Turn right on Stewart Parkway. CCC is on the right. Services: Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Cancer Smoking/Vaping Cessation Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - COMMUNITY CANCER CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY CANCER CENTER
